title: Beja, Alentejo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Beja is a city in Alentejo with a population of 23,875. A peaceful Alentejo city with a well-preserved medieval castle, Roman ruins, and a relaxed rural atmosphere.
